subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of what was and what shall be, that he may be drawn by the verses of his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالله رب ما کان و ما یکون لینجذب بایات ربه و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
